archetype: Swiss & High-Contrast mixed with Organic & Earthy - Premium Enterprise SaaS

headings.h1: text-5xl sm:text-6xl lg:text-7xl font-black tracking-tighter text-[#0F172A] leading-tight
headings.h2: text-3xl sm:text-4xl lg:text-5xl font-bold tracking-tight text-[#0F172A] leading-tight

spacing.container: px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8 max-w-7xl mx-auto w-full

buttons.primary: bg-[#2563EB] hover:bg-[#1D4ED8] text-white rounded-xl px-6 py-3 font-medium transition-all duration-200 shadow-[0_2px_10px_rgba(37,99,235,0.2)] hover:shadow-[0_4px_15px_rgba(37,99,235,0.3)] hover:-translate-y-0.5
buttons.gradient: bg-gradient-to-r from-[#3B82F6] to-[#06B6D4] hover:opacity-90 text-white rounded-xl px-6 py-3 font-medium transition-all duration-200 shadow-sm
buttons.secondary: bg-white border border-[#E2E8F0] hover:bg-[#F8FAFC] text-[#0F172A] rounded-xl px-6 py-3 font-medium transition-all duration-200 shadow-sm
buttons.ghost: bg-transparent hover:bg-[#F1F5F9] text-[#64748B] hover:text-[#0F172A] rounded-xl px-4 py-2 font-medium transition-colors

cards.interactive: bg-white rounded-2xl border border-[#E2E8F0] hover:border-[#3B82F6]/30 hover:shadow-[0_8px_30px_-4px_rgba(37,99,235,0.1)] transition-all duration-300

inputs.default: w-full rounded-xl border border-[#E2E8F0] bg-white px-4 py-3 text-sm text-[#0F172A] placeholder:text-[#64748B] focus:border-[#2563EB] focus:outline-none focus:ring-4 focus:ring-[#2563EB]/10 transition-all
inputs.label: block text-sm font-medium text-[#0F172A] mb-2

badges.default: inline-flex items-center rounded-full bg-[#F1F5F9] px-3 py-1 text-xs font-semibold text-[#0F172A]
badges.primary: inline-flex items-center rounded-full bg-[#EBF5FF] px-3 py-1 text-xs font-semibold text-[#2563EB]
badges.success: inline-flex items-center rounded-full bg-green-50 px-3 py-1 text-xs font-semibold text-green-700

landing.hero: relative pt-32 pb-20 sm:pt-40 sm:pb-24 overflow-hidden bg-[#F8FAFC]
landing.split_section: grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-2 gap-12 lg:gap-24 items-center

auth.left_panel: hidden lg:flex flex-col bg-[#0F172A] p-12 relative overflow-hidden text-white justify-between
auth.right_panel: flex flex-col justify-center px-8 sm:px-16 lg:px-24 bg-white

onboarding.header: h-20 border-b border-[#E2E8F0] bg-white flex items-center justify-between px-8
onboarding.content: flex-1 max-w-3xl mx-auto w-full py-12 px-4 sm:px-6

dashboard.sidebar: w-64 bg-white border-r border-[#E2E8F0] flex-shrink-0 flex flex-col z-20
dashboard.header: h-16 bg-white border-b border-[#E2E8F0] flex items-center justify-between px-6 z-10

hero_illustration.description: Abstract blue gradient orb for hero background element

auth_illustration.description: Dynamic abstract blue light streaks for the dark left panel of auth screens

avatars.description: Professional man in grey suit - Use for testimonials and team members (replace with real photo)
Professional woman in black suit - Use for testimonials and user profile (replace with real photo)

logos.description: Integration logo - Use in integration grids and partner sections

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the color palette provided: #2563EB, #3B82F6, #06B6D4 for primary elements, gradients, and CTAs.
Use the Inter font globally. Headings must have tight tracking (tracking-tight or tracking-tighter) and bold/black weights for a premium enterprise feel.
Implement the 'White Theme' for the main application, utilizing #F8FAFC for backgrounds and #FFFFFF for cards, accented with #E2E8F0 borders.
Components must use generous border radii: rounded-2xl for cards and panels, rounded-xl for buttons, inputs, and dropdowns.
Apply generous whitespace (p-6 to p-8 inside cards, py-24 to py-32 for marketing sections). Do not cram content.
The Live Product Demo Preview on the Landing Page should showcase real product functionality with contrasting dark theme.
Use Framer Motion for entrance animations (fade up), staggered lists, and premium micro-interactions on hover.
Always add 'data-testid' attributes to all interactive elements, buttons, inputs, and navigational links.
Use lucide-react for all iconography to maintain a clean, consistent, professional look.
